headline: Is It Time To Reassess KeyCorp (KEY) After Its 60% Share Price Climb?
summary: If you are wondering whether KeyCorp's current share price lines up with its underlying value, this article walks you through the key pieces you need to weigh that question. Over the last year the stock recorded a 59.8% return, with 14.3% over the past 30 days, 1.6% over the last week, 3.9% year to date and a recent close at US$21.80, which may have shifted how the market views its risk and reward profile. Recent coverage has focused on KeyCorp's position within U.S. regional banks and...
